word: H5590 - סָעַר - çâʻar - saw-ar' - Be tempest

sections.paragraph:
Original: סער

Transliteration: sâ‛ar

Phonetic: saw-ar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to storm, rage
    1. (Qal)
      1. to storm
      2. stormy, growing storm (participle)
    2. (Niphal) to be enraged
    3. (Piel) to storm away
    4. (Pual) to be driven by storm

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1528b

Part(s) of speech: Verb
